steps.title: Identify the goal
steps.content: The student wants to emphasize the significance of a similarity between two of the kits. The notes say Pbact alone hit both targets (high yield + purity near $1$). So CTAB 2X and Pplant share a meaningful similarity: both were judged less effective than Pbact.

steps.title: Match the choice
steps.content:
(B) states that CTAB 2X and Pplant were both deemed less effective than Pbact due to insufficient yield or purity — capturing the meaningful shared status.

(A) lists trivial both-above-thresholds facts (not significant). (C) misstates purity (CTAB 2X was $2.2$, not equal to Pbact's $1.6$). (D) only emphasizes Pplant's failure, not a similarity.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
